context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Nested process restrictions are now surfaced as explicit direct-run guidance in command-plan results, so agent finish can tell agents to run the failing command directly when managed sandboxes reject nested spawnSync.
current_tasks: Commit 0b0677b8 fix(cli): explain restricted nested spawns.

Validation passed: pnpm -C packages/cli run test -- command-plan; pnpm -C packages/cli run type-check; pnpm -C packages/cli run build; timeout 60s refarm agent finish --lane after-edit --run --json returned direct-run guidance; refarm check --next-action --json passed directly.

Observed sandbox behavior: Node child_process spawnSync may emit EPERM under nested execution even when direct shell commands work; finish now points to the direct command instead of encouraging repeated nested finish retries.
next_actions: Continue naming audit/split before publish: avoid Refarm-branded terms in SDK surfaces that should be provider/product neutral.
Return to package readiness/publication lane for vault-seed-ready primitives, using .refarm/handoff for local tarball handoffs.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
